Discover Why Women Are Switching to Weighted Glass.

Kalii™ is a handcrafted borosilicate-glass G-spot massager from Biird™ — weighted, ergonomically curved, and built for temperature play. No batteries. No buzz. Just sensation.

Free & discreet shipping · plain packaging

Designed in Amsterdam·Handcrafted Glass·5-Year Guarantee

💎

Weighted Borosilicate Glass — Not Plastic, Not Silicone.

Kalii™ is handcrafted from high borosilicate glass, the same material used in laboratory glassware: phthalate-free, body-safe, and built to last. The 456g weight and ergonomic G-spot curve let gravity do the work — no batteries, no buzz, just deliberate sensation.

🌡️

Temperature Play, Built In.

Glass holds heat. Run Kalii™ under warm water before play for soft warmth, or chill it for a cool, electrifying contrast against the skin. It's a sensation silicone simply can't deliver — and the moment most first-time users say it "changed everything."

How to Enjoy Kalii in 3 Simple Steps

1

Warm or Cool

Run Kalii™ under warm water for soft warmth — or chill it briefly for a refreshing, electric sensation. Glass absorbs and holds temperature beautifully.

Takes 30 seconds
2

Glide & Explore the Curve

Apply a generous amount of water-based lubricant. The smooth surface, gentle curve, and flowing ribs are designed to target the G-spot — let gravity and the 456g weight do the work.

Take your time
3

Wash & Store

A gentle wash with soap and warm water is all it takes. Dry, then tuck Kalii™ back into its free vegan-leather case — designed to slip into a drawer, suitcase, or shelf without a second glance.

Case included free
